untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom requires detection of three distinct troughs with specific geometric symmetry relationships (center trough significantly below shoulders, left/right shoulder equality, matched widths). Available indicators cannot reliably identify multi-bar formation structure, relative depth relationships between multiple troughs, or measure symmetry across a pattern. Conversion uses approximate reversal conditions (low troughs, oversold RSI, wick formation) but cannot validate the core three-trough geometry requirement.
